headlines.description: Croatia earned a spot in the World Cup knockout round, getting goals from Nikola Vlasic and Luka Sucic to beat Ghana 2-1 on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Croatia edge Ghana to advance to WC knockouts

headlines.description: Jude Bellingham and Harry Kane scored early in the second half, lifting England over Panama 2-0 Saturday and into what appears to be a more favorable bracket for the knockout phase of the World Cup.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bellingham, Kane net again as England top group

headlines.description: Colombia finished the World Cup 's opening round as the Group K winners after playing Portugal to a scoreless draw Saturday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Colombia win Group K after draw with Portugal

headlines.description: Congo has advanced to the knockout stage of the World Cup for the first time by rallying to a 3-1 win against Uzbekistan.
headlines.shortLinkText: Congo seal historic 1st-ever spot in WC knockouts
